series_metadata.series_description: The Permanent Authorization Form (AC-2) is submitted by the Third Party Administrator (TPA) and/or the employer. The AC-2 provides permanent rights to the TPA to view or access any of the employers’ rate information. The AC-2 is scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS). UDS is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: The paper AC-2 forms are immediately scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS) when they are received. After the AC-2 forms are in UDS they are reviewed for quality assurance. If the qaulity is accepted, the paper form can be destroyed. ; Electronic: The AC-2 forms are scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS). If the policy is cancelled and there is no balance, then retain the electronic files for five years. If there is a balance on the policy, the electronic files will be retained for 5 more years (total of ten years)., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
